Fix audio transcription: use native FormData instead of npm form-data

The npm form-data package produces corrupted multipart data when used
with Node.js native fetch, causing OpenAI Whisper API to return
"Could not parse multipart form". Switched to native FormData + Blob
(available in Node.js 18+) which works correctly with native fetch.
Removed form-data from dependencies as it's no longer needed.

feat: add VT100 emulator for proper terminal rendering

Replace naive strings.Builder with charmbracelet/x/vt SafeEmulator
in pane rendering. The VT emulator interprets ANSI escape sequences

terminal output instead of garbled raw bytes.

- Resize VT emulator when pane dimensions change

commit.message:
fix: prevent duplicate sells, stale entry prices, and stop-loss slippage

- executor: detect stop/ladder/trailing sells → use 300 bps slippage instead
  of 100 bps to avoid 0x1788 SlippageToleranceExceeded on urgent exits
- exit-manager: always overwrite entry price on re-buy (removes stale guard),
  clear trailing/ladder state via clearSymbolState, acquire shared sell lock
  in executeSell to prevent concurrent duplicate exits
- reason.js: add sell lock to profit ladder bypass path so it cannot race with
  exit-manager or watchdog; use td.price (current market) first for entry
  price on re-buys instead of persisted stale price

commit.message:
Drop PreToolUse hook, install to settings.json not settings.local.json

PermissionRequest hooks only fire when registered in the global
~/.claude/settings.json — hooks defined only in settings.local.json
are silently ignored for newer event types. Switched install.sh to
target settings.json with deep-merge to preserve existing hooks.

Removed PreToolUse from hook config and install since mirror flow
was already skipping it; PermissionRequest is the sole approval trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v10: V_DIVIDER=3.81 (corrected), ADC_LO_MV=700, USB-aware EMA seed

V_DIVIDER=2.61 was wrong: the v5 boot scan ran with USB connected, and
USB charger spikes inflated the unfiltered 32-sample average from the
true ~1050 mV to ~1600 mV (half signal, half noise). That gave a false
V_DIVIDER of 4169/1600=2.61. Loop data (range-filtered, valid:32/32)
confirmed true signal = 1040-1060 mV at Fluke=4.0V → V_DIVIDER=3.81.

Hardware: R_top≈280kΩ, R_bottom≈100kΩ → (280+100)/100 = 3.80 ≈ 3.81
(Seeed docs say "200kΩ:200kΩ" but actual board differs.)

ADC_LO_MV: 800→700 to cover empty battery (3.0V/3.81=787mV).
ADC_HI_MV: unchanged at 2200 (USB spikes observed above 1848 mV raw).

EMA boot seed: now checks (bool)Serial. If USB is connected at boot,
scan is noise-inflated → seed at 3.7V. If USB absent, scan is clean →
seed from actual scan value. USB disconnect re-seed corrects it anyway.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: force flush Baileys event buffer after connection opens

Baileys v6.7+ buffers messages.upsert events when restoring sessions
with existing credentials. The buffer is only released when the
'CB:ib,,offline' handler fires, which sometimes never happens.
This caused the bot to appear connected but not read or respond to
messages. Added safety ev.flush() 5s after connection opens, plus
try/catch around the entire message handler to prevent silent failures.

commit.message:
fix: floor confidence-scaled trades to mcap-tier minimum instead of blocking

Root cause: the 2f-min check in enforceMandate() was blocking trades where the
confidence multiplier (0.65× or 0.35×) pushed a $10 proposal below the minimum
trade floor:
  - confidence 0.62–0.74 → 0.65× → $10 × 0.65 = $6.50 < $10 → BLOCKED
  - confidence 0.50–0.61 → 0.35× → $10 × 0.35 = $3.50 < $10 → BLOCKED
  - confidence 0.50–0.61 → 0.35× → $5  × 0.35 = $1.75 < $5  → BLOCKED

This silently converted Claude's top buy signal (HABIBI, NEMOCLAW, HAWKING) to
action:'hold' via the approvedTrades.length===0 path, wasting $100+ idle USDC
through multiple cycles of strong momentum signals.

Fix: raise the amount to the mcap-tier minimum (FLOORED) rather than discarding
the trade. Only truly block if raising to the minimum would exceed the available
cash above the cash floor — i.e. we genuinely can't afford the minimum bet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(foundations): sync all token stories with design-tokens.css (#59)

* Fix BentoCard 50/50 split, BentoBlock full-width bg, and ComposableLandingPage updates

BentoCard.css:
- Replace flex: 1 0 0 + aspect-ratio with flex: 0 0 50% on both image and content
  for full/desktop variant — gives explicit 50/50 split regardless of content width
- Add box-sizing: border-box to content column so padding doesn't overflow 50% basis
- Remove aspect-ratio (height is correctly driven by the content column; img fills via object-fit)

ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx:
- Wrap BentoBlock AnimateIn in width: 100% div so block background extends full page width
  (outer container uses alignItems: center which was constraining the unwrapped AnimateIn)
- Change BentoBlock colour from secondary to primary
- Remove showTitle={false} and showButton={false} from ComposableCardBlock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename ComposableCardBlock to CardBlock

- Rename directory: ComposableCardBlock/ → CardBlock/
- Rename all files: ComposableCardBlock.{tsx,css,stories.tsx,contensis.json} → CardBlock.*
- Update component: interface names (ComposableCardBlockItem → CardBlockItem,
  ComposableCardBlockProps → CardBlockProps), component export (CardBlock),
  CSS import, and all BEM classes (.composable-card-block → .card-block)
- Update barrel exports: CardBlock/index.ts and src/components/index.ts
- Update all consumers: Canvas.stories.tsx, ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx
- Update Storybook storySort: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'
- Update content model registry key: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor BentoBlock stories — remove token violations and reduce duplication

- Import allVariantsStack helper; replace inline flex-column stack object
- Extract baseItem constant; build DEFAULT_ITEMS as [baseItem × 4]
- Extract sectionLabelWithTopGapStyle (spreads sectionLabelStyle + marginTop token)
- Extract mobileWrapper constant; replace hardcoded 360px with var(--max-width-mobile)

Secondary buttons now inherit the parent surface colour rather than
forcing white (#FFFFFF) or dark (#222222). Hover colour is unchanged,
so interactive feedback is preserved on all surfaces.

commit.message:
Fix PageSpeed fallback: handle valid response without lighthouseResult

When PageSpeed API returns a valid HTTP response but without a
lighthouseResult field (e.g. error payload), scores were left at 0.
Added else-fallback blocks for both mobile and desktop calls to
estimate scores from HTML analysis when lighthouse data is absent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(09-02): add autonomy REST API, approval sweep, dashboard tier UI

- GET/PUT /api/autonomy/tiers endpoints for tier CRUD
- Approval timeout sweep job (every 60s) auto-denies expired approvals
- Dashboard settings page with Autonomy Tiers card (sorted by priority)
- ApiClient listToolTierConfig + updateToolTier methods
- ToolTierConfig/AutonomyTier types exported from api-client
- 8 route + sweep tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add homography chain calibration module for low-confidence frames

Implements homography chaining to propagate calibration from anchor frames
to fill gaps where BroadTrack/PnLCalib fails due to extreme camera angles.

Components:
- ChainCalibrator: Main orchestrator with legacy/improved methods
- FeatureMatcher: SIFT-based feature extraction and matching
- HomographyPropagator: Chain propagation with drift detection
- DynamicMasker: Player detection for feature masking
- CameraParamConverter: Homography <-> camera params conversion
- BidirectionalSmoother: Offline smoothing with weighted merge
- ParamInterpolator: Camera parameter interpolation utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

UI overhaul: toolbar spring physics, sidebar hover lift, layout refinements

- Toolbar sticky behavior with 3-state machine (natural/sticky/hidden)
- Spring animations for toolbar reveal/hide/settle transitions
- Rubber-band scroll physics on sticky toolbar
- Right sidebar hover lift effect on cards (translateY + shadow)
- Sidebar transform-based animation for toolbar hide/show
- FilterSidebar scroll containment and styling updates
- ListingCard hover lift and layout improvements
- Grid layout adjustments for 3-column responsive design
- Backend: add trust proxy for nginx reverse proxy
- i18n: add new filter-related keys for all 5 languages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add immutable blockchain layer with PoW, Merkle trees and cross-verification

- New blockchain.py: local permissioned blockchain with proof-of-work,
  Merkle tree transaction integrity, disk persistence, and thread safety
- Upgraded main.py to v0.2.0: every query submit/approve/execute is now
  recorded both on PostgreSQL and on the blockchain
- New endpoints: /blockchain, /blockchain/verify, /blockchain/query/{id},
  /integrity (cross-verify PG vs blockchain), /query/execute, /operators
- init.sql: added immutability triggers (block UPDATE/DELETE on audit_ledger
  and approvals), query_executions table, duplicate vote prevention
- Dashboard v0.2.0: tab-based UI with blockchain explorer, block visualization,
  cross-verification, query execution, and per-query blockchain trail
- Docker: persistent blockchain_data volume, updated Dockerfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: replace Agent 架构研究 hover thumbnail with real image

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use PermissionRequest hook for approval UI instead of PreToolUse

PreToolUse fires for ALL tool calls including auto-approved ones,
causing approval buttons to flash briefly on the StreamDeck. The new
PermissionRequest hook event only fires when Claude's permission
dialog is about to appear, so the deck only shows approval UI when
the user actually needs to make a decision.

- Add permission-request.sh hook (non-blocking, mirror flow)
- Add PermissionRequest event to state machine with transitions
- Skip PreToolUse enqueue/transition in mirror flow (informational only)
- Add idle:PostToolUse → thinking transition for auto-approved tools
- Update installer to include PermissionRequest hook config
- Update all tests to use PermissionRequest for mirror approval scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Trigger.dev hourly task queries integration_logs for recent failures
- Claude claude-opus-4-6 categorizes root causes (network, 5xx, CB open, chaos, etc.)

- Severity-gated: skips Jira for low-severity findings
- Appends audit row to integration_logs with analysis metadata
- Graceful no-op when Jira env vars not configured

- ROADMAP: mark Phase 6.7 and v3.7.0 as released

commit.message:
fix: increase panel downward offset to 1.5 units

- Panel mesh center now lower relative to rotation container
- Helps align panel with torque tube position

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v9: widen ADC window [800,2200] for V_DIVIDER calibration

ADC_LO_MV 900→800, ADC_HI_MV 1750→2200.
Previous 1750 upper limit would reject a V_DIVIDER=2.0 full-charge
reading (4.2V/2.0 = 2100mV > 1750mV = silently filtered, EMA decays
from seed toward 0V, displaying ~3V on a full battery).
Wider window lets the raw mV show on the OLED S: row so V_DIVIDER
can be computed as: fluke_mV / oled_raw_mV.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phase 3 Task 1 完成 - 端到端测试套件

完成 P3-T1.1 端到端管道测试，包括：
- 创建完整的端到端管道测试（Database → Analysis → Results）
- 测试数据完整性（消息数量、时间范围一致性）
- 性能基准测试（100 条消息 8ms，远超 1000ms 目标）
- 并发处理测试（3 个联系人并行分析）
- 错误处理测试（不存在的联系人、数据不足）
- 所有 9 个 E2E 测试通过

性能表现：
- 100 条消息处理时间：8ms（目标 <1000ms）
- 数据库读取：0ms
- 分析执行：8ms
- 总时间：8ms

Phase 3 完成度：7/7 任务（100%）🎉

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: raise LLM body review cap from 30KB to 50KB (#297)

Skills with SKILL.md bodies between 30-50KB were getting grade C solely
because the body exceeded the prompt review cap, even with no safety
issues. 50KB aligns with the existing per-file cap.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename app from Hitster to Plongster (#30)

Hitster is trademarked by Jumbo Games. Plongster is an original name
that nods to the Norwegian "pling plong" (musical sounds) and pays
homage to Hitster with the -ster suffix.

- Rename all user-facing text (title, h1, manifest, icons)
- Rename localStorage keys from hitster-* to plongster-*
- Add migration to preserve existing users' saved state
- Reset service worker cache to plongster-v1
- Update all docs, tests, tools, and package.json
- Update manifest start_url/scope for repo rename

Closes #28
